title: Circulated Letters in MCF year 2023
contentHtml:
• To prepare PwBDs roaster again from 01.07.2022
  • E-Book of Policy circulars related to Compassionate Ground Appointment 
  • Policy guidelines for hiring of attendants in lieu of TADK on contractual basis through outsourcing agencies in MCF/RBL
  • Forwarding of Inter Railway Own Request transfer applications of staff to PLW, Patiala
  • Date of next increment under Rule 10 of Railway Services (Revised Pay) Rules-2016
  • Date of next increment under Rule 10 of Railway Services (Revised Pay) Rules-2016
  • Colony Committee nomination place 2023
  • Policy for allotment, retention, and other related issues of residential quarter for non-gazetted staff of MCF/RBL
  • Charter of Commitments on various matters - Time line thereof.
  • Official Dealings between the Administration and MP&MLA- Observance of Proper Procedure
  • Amendment in Policy of engagement of attendant in lieu of TADK
  • Policy of engagement of attendants in lieu of TADK
  • Revised option for joining in newly created workshop (RCNK) NCR, Jhansi
  • Last date of apply coverage under Railway Service (Pension), 1993 in place of National Pension System
  • Format of coverage under Railway Service (Pension), 1993 rules in place of National Pension System
  • Coverage under Railway Service (pensions), 1993, Rules in place of National Pension System
  • Option for joining in newly created Workshop (RCNK) NCR, Jhansi
  • Modification in the e-Pass Module of HRMS
  • Extension of date of finalization of E-APAR for the Year 2020-2021 and 2021-2022 through HRMS reg.
  • Eligibility criteria an account of educational qualification entered in the Service Regards of the employees for appearing in departmental selections
